body_errors.note: Printed page has βρόμον, not plural βρόμους.
Printed page reads βδελύσσῃ, not second-person form.
Printed page has σὰ ἐστιν; transcript accent appears wrong if intended as neuter plural.

apparatus_errors.note: Lemma should be βρομον to match the printed text.
Lemma should be σπινθηρα, singular, matching the printed text.
At XII 1 the apparatus lemma is πασι, not πασιν.

note: Transcript is mostly strong, but a few clear singular/plural and form mismatches in both body and apparatus prevent sign-off.
